name: Adair County Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Adair County Family YMCA in Kirksville, MO! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Brashear Park
description: There are absolutely no pickle ball courts at Brashear Park. There is one basketball court -- not two -- and it is not marked for pickleball.

name: Patryla Park
description: Patryla Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kirksville, MO. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Rehoboth Baptist Church gym
description: Rehoboth Baptist Church gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kirksville, MO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Truman State University Student Recreation Center
description: Can check out pickleball equipment (balls, paddles) and ask staff to set up nets by asking at front desk.
fees: Members only — Membership limited to Truman State University students, staff, faculty. Alumni can purchase guest passes. Visitors can only gain access by attending with a current member at a cost of $
